health_conditions: history of injury and illness with significant muscle loss
elevated testosterone (slightly above normal female range)

benefits.description: Debilitating DOMS lasting 4-5 days resolved; no soreness the day after and two days after a heavy gym session
Chronic left knee pain felt much better and less bothersome while lifting
Hit every PB and almost went 10% heavier on all lifts

side_effects.description: BPC stings before injection if not recapped and left to sit; increasing sensitivity in stomach injection area

protocol_notes: Loading phase of 6 weeks then switching to maintenance. Injecting BPC 2x daily and TB500 2x per week subcutaneously in stomach. Used 5mg vials with 1mL bacteriostatic water. Uses 0.5mL insulin syringes. Diet: 160g protein daily, 1900 calorie deficit. Began GHK-Cu after initial 3-week report period. Had bloodwork ~1 year prior showing no deficiencies, slightly elevated testosterone and iron.
